revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-1-860

A wave which can be resolved into two plane polarized waves which are perpendicular to each other and propagate in the same direction. The amplitudes of the waves may be equal or un-equal and of arbitrary time-phase. The tip of the component of the electric field vector in the plane normal to the direction of propagation describes an ellipse.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Elliptically polarized wave}}
